1.description: Retrieve Finnmark county geometry to filter municipalities

2.description: Retrieve all municipalities within Finnmark county

4.description: Retrieve 200-year flood zones (flomareal) for spatial join

5.description: Retrieve buildings for spatial join with flood zones

7.description: Join flood zone buildings with municipalities

8.description: Count buildings in flood zones per municipality

9.description: Sort municipalities by building count descending

args.sql:
SELECT
    fylkesnummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke
WHERE
    administrativenhetnavn[1] = 'Finnmark';

args.sql:
SELECT
    f.fylkesnummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(f.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke f
JOIN
    fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.administrativenhetnavn navn
    ON f.objid = navn.fylke_fk
WHERE
    navn.navn = 'Finnmark' AND navn.sprak = 'nor';

4.description: Get 200-year flood zones in Finnmark municipalities

6.description: Count buildings in flood zones per municipality

7.description: Sort municipalities by building count descending
